visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a high-ceilinged warehouse retail store with bright overhead industrial lighting. Two young women are the focal point; one wears a light pink short-sleeved top and a white maxi skirt, while the other dons a blue short-sleeved top with a white floral pattern, a white tiered skirt, and a leopard-print bucket hat. They appear highly animated, gesturing towards the camera with wide smiles. In the background, rows of metal shelving and other shoppers are visible, creating a bustling retail atmosphere. Large yellow text overlays are present at the bottom of the frame. (2) The camera transitions to a medium shot where the two women are holding a large cardboard box featuring the Lenor brand logo. The box is predominantly blue and white with images of pink rose petals and laundry items. The woman in the hat points enthusiastically at the product. The lighting remains bright and consistent with the retail environment. Behind them, stacks of product pallets and store signs are visible. (3) A cut to a scene in a domestic setting. The woman in the hat is kneeling in front of a white front-loading washing machine in a laundry area. She holds a purple Snoopy-themed basket filled with laundry supplies. The background shows a modern laundry room with white appliances and a window overlooking a cityscape at night. (4) In a close-up shot, the woman in the hat pours small pink spherical beads from a pink refill pouch into a black measuring cap. The beads appear textured and uniform. She then tosses the beads into the open drum of the washing machine. The action is captured with a medium close-up, focusing on the product's physical state and the pouring motion. (5) The scene shifts back to an indoor living room with a brown leather sofa and wooden blinds. One woman holds up a light gray, textured sweater, smiling and shaking it gently. Later, both women are seen in a vast outdoor flower field with colorful rows of blooms under an overcast sky. They walk away from the camera, then turn back, laughing and posing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 就是這個! [Subtitle]: 就是這個! (2) [Variety]: 日本女生身上淡香的秘密就是靠它! (3) [Subtitle]: 不用再去日本扛 好市多就有賣! 而且現在買很划算 你看銷量超好! (4) [Subtitle]: 這款最熱銷最受歡迎的 蘭諾衣物芳香豆 晨曦玫瑰香 10/27-11/9 限時折扣160元 年度補貨趁現在喔 (5) [Subtitle]: 日本熱銷 家裡不能錯過的 衣香秘密武器 這是好市多才買得到的香味 裡面有一罐885ml的芳香豆 跟可以補充兩次的 超值環保補充包 (6) [Subtitle]: 畢竟洗衣服不只要花很多時間 水費電費也都很珍貴 所以我們在洗衣時都會加蘭諾衣物芳香豆 晨曦玫瑰香 (7) [Subtitle]: 這樣換季衣物拿出來穿 也不用再重洗 (8) [Variety]: 散發高級又有質感的淡香 (9) [Subtitle]: 不管放衣櫃多久 只要想穿都能隨時上場 (10) [Subtitle]: 它的味道就是優雅迷人的玫瑰花茶 跟蘭蔻的玫瑰淡香很像 尤其在台灣潮濕悶熱的氣候 更需要這種芬芳 (11) [Subtitle]: 在外一整天身上都還會有 淡淡清香很舒服 (12) [Subtitle]: 要買趁現在 錯過的真的很可惜 台灣最受歡迎的蘭諾香 還不快去好市多買起來!

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long dark hair in a pink top and white skirt, the other with long dark hair, a leopard-print hat, and a blue floral top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a bright, busy Costco warehouse, a domestic laundry room with a white washing machine, a cozy living room with a leather couch, and a scenic hillside flower garden.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female vocal narration delivered at a fast speech rate with high pitch variability. The voice is enthusiastic and friendly. Simultaneously, an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track starts, featuring a strong 4/4 beat and bright synthesizer textures. A sharp whoosh sound effect marks the transition into the next scene. The background ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a clean studio-style voiceover mix. (2) As the narration continues detailing product features, the BGM maintains a consistent high-energy rhythm. A distinct ding sound effect is heard when price information is mentioned on-screen. The vocal delivery remains projected and authoritative yet approachable. The music-to-speech ratio is balanced, with the vocals clearly intelligible above the rhythmic background track. No significant ambient noise from the store is audible. (3) The audio texture shifts slightly as a percussive clink sound is heard when the laundry beads are poured into the cap, followed by a muffled thud as the beads hit the washing machine drum. These incidental-style sound effects are likely post-produced for emphasis. The narration's tone shifts to a more personal, storytelling style while maintaining high arousal. The BGM continues without interruption. (4) A sparkle sound effect accompanies the visual of the clean clothes, reinforcing the theme of freshness. The narration concludes with a high-arousal call to action, with the speaker's pitch rising at the end of sentences for emphasis. The music swells slightly in volume during the final seconds before a clean fade-out. The overall mix is highly polished with a high signal-to-noise ratio.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Lenor laundry beads available at Costco Taiwan by emphasizing their rose scent, long-lasting freshness, and current promotional discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to demonstrating and praising the Lenor laundry beads, including specific pricing and sale dates at Costco.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal social-media editing style with heavy text overlays and frequent SFX to maintain viewer engagement for a commercial product.
